cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager at Jobs via Dice,

I am excited to submit my application for the Lead Data Analyst - P&C Insurance opportunity with Jobs via Dice. I am interested in this opportunity because Resourcesoft's focus on technology consulting within the insurance domain aligns perfectly with my career aspirations and demonstrated analytical capabilities.

What interests me about working for Resourcesoft is its dedication to enabling project optimization and its commitment to mentoring employees to advance their careers. This approach excites and inspires me because I am passionate about leveraging data to drive business growth and continuous improvement.

I believe my strong proficiency in SQL and my experience with Snowflake would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on data-driven problem-solving and efficiency. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual reporting, which reduced data mismatches and improved work efficiency by 40%. This resulted in a consistent "single source of truth" for business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies.

Ultimately, I know that the Lead Data Analyst - P&C Insurance role at Jobs via Dice would allow me to bring my advanced SQL query development and data validation skills to lead the technical implementation and data migration for new enterprise policy administration platforms. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my data governance and stakeholder collaboration skills. I designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns to measure audience response and lift, providing the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend. This resulted in designing and executing A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns to measure audience response and lift, providing the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend.

I'm excited by the opportunity to use my data mapping and transformation specification skills in working on integrated insurance systems at Jobs via Dice. I know that my advanced SQL skills and my experience with cloud-based data warehouses align with what it takes to succeed at the Lead Data Analyst - P&C Insurance role.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
